full_description: Mood Tracker is an innovative app designed to help you monitor and understand your emotional state. By tracking your moods and emotions, you can identify patterns and trends, gaining valuable insights into your mental well-being. The app allows you to log your emotions and energy levels, providing a comprehensive overview of your emotional state over time. With Mood Tracker, you can: - Record your emotions and energy levels throughout the day - Identify patterns and trends in your emotional state - Set reminders to track your moods at specific times - View detailed statistics and graphs of your emotional state - Export your data for further analysis. By using Mood Tracker, you can develop a better understanding of your emotions and make positive changes to improve your mental health and well-being.
